layout.tagline:
Your technical SEO watchdog.
Catches regressions before they get expensive.

login.totpInfo: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code.

register.oauthTerms: By continuing with a provider, you accept the {cgu} and the {cgv}.
register.terms: I declare that I am acting in a professional capacity and I accept the {cgu} and the {cgv}. See our {privacy}.

modal.title: One step left before your analysis
modal.intro: Your site is ready to be analyzed. Create your account and the scan starts immediately: your full SEO/GEO report will be ready in a few minutes.
modal.perk3: Full analysis of your site in a few minutes

forgot.sentText: If an account exists for {email}, you will receive a reset link shortly.
forgot.checkSpam: Remember to check your spam folder.
forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.text: Enter your email address. You will receive a link to reset your password.

reset.successText: Your password has been reset. You can sign in.
reset.expiredText: This reset link has expired or is invalid. Request a new link.
reset.title: New password
reset.text: Choose a new password for your account.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.desc: Choose a name for your workspace.

invite.errorExpired: This invitation has expired. Request a new invitation.
